name: Sunday Songwriter's Open Mic Every Week at Lucinda's
description: Every Sunday join us at Lucindas for our Nashville Style (which means we play in the round) Songwriters Open Mic!!! 1pm Sign up in person to get on the list! Two ORIGINAL songs per a person (1 per person if were really crowded) Please refrain from talking while artists are playing. We cant wait to see you!

name: Jon Gordon Nonet
description: Jon Gordon is a world-renowned artist and one of the most successful and accomplished alto and soprano saxophonists of his generation. Jazz Improv magazine journalist Brandon Bernstein wrote, Jon Gordon is a master. His compositions, improvisation, tone, and technical virtuosity set him apart as an elite musician of our time. Jon is a winner of the Thelonious Monk award. His 2008 C.D., Within Worlds, received 4+1/2 stars from Down Beat magazine. The magazine also selected the C.D. as one of the top jazz recordings of the decade. His next C.D., Evolution, was selected by The Jazz Journal and the Penguin Guide to Jazz, as well as journalists Neil Tesser and Gene Seymour, as one of the Best Jazz C.D.sof 2009. His 2021 C.D., Stranger than Fiction, was selected by the Winnipeg Free Press and jazz journalists Jae Sinnett, Ken Dryden, Mark Houston, and Larry Hollis to their Best of 2021 lists. It was nominated for a Juno award for Best Jazz release. He has played on several Juno and Grammy award nominated and winning recordings.His most recent CD, 7th Ave South, was selected by the Times of London as one of the Best Jazz releases of 2024. Jon has been voted numerous times as a Rising Star, or Talent Deserving Wider Recognition on multiple saxophones, as well as in the composition category, in the annual Down Beat Critics Polls. He is also the author of Foundations for Improvisers, For Sue and Jazz Dialogues. He is currently a professor at the University of Manitoba.Jon Gordon is one of the greatest alto players ever.- Phil WoodsGordon has embraced the history of his instrument, carrying with it the ability to extend music as a universal language- Wayne ShorterJon is among that elite few that are truly great alto saxophonists. Not only is he one of my favorite alto and soprano players, hes also a wonderful and very creative composer. Maria Schneider
